brief_justification: Correct answer (Yes) with valid causal reasoning and exact numeric derivation; Multi-level analysis covering DAG structure, backdoor criterion, observational vs interventional equivalence, and quantitative computation; Some self-monitoring via RA²R suppress/amplify signals but no explicit mid-reasoning course correction; Verified by computing both observational and interventional probabilities and confirming the no-confounding claim structurally; Acknowledges the key structural assumption (no backdoor path) but doesn't deeply explore what would change if Skill affected Spicy; Considers the distinction between observational and interventional distributions as an alternative framing; Complete audit trail from DAG specification through backdoor analysis to numeric computation, fully reproducible.
